cases.name: ANY quantifier over an array property with a contains predicate
cases.cypher: MATCH (n:NodeKind1) WHERE n.usedeskeyonly OR ANY(type IN n.supportedencryptiontypes WHERE type CONTAINS 'DES') RETURN n LIMIT 100

cases.name: ALL quantifier over an array property with a contains predicate
cases.cypher: MATCH (n:NodeKind1) WHERE n.usedeskeyonly OR ALL(type IN n.supportedencryptiontypes WHERE type CONTAINS 'DES') RETURN n LIMIT 100

cases.name: NONE quantifier over an array property with a contains predicate
cases.cypher: MATCH (n:NodeKind1) WHERE n.usedeskeyonly OR NONE(type IN n.supportedencryptiontypes WHERE type CONTAINS 'DES') RETURN n LIMIT 100

cases.name: SINGLE quantifier over an array property with a contains predicate
cases.cypher: MATCH (n:NodeKind1) WHERE n.usedeskeyonly OR SINGLE(type IN n.supportedencryptiontypes WHERE type CONTAINS 'DES') RETURN n LIMIT 100

cases.name: multiple ANY quantifiers where the second ANY has a compound OR predicate
cases.cypher: MATCH (n:NodeKind1) WHERE n.usedeskeyonly OR ANY(type IN n.supportedencryptiontypes WHERE type CONTAINS 'DES') OR ANY(type IN n.serviceprincipalnames WHERE toLower(type) CONTAINS 'mssql' OR toLower(type) CONTAINS 'mssqlcluster') RETURN n LIMIT 100
